name: Scotcheroos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the sugar and corn syrup. Heat just until bubbly.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter. Stir until well blended.
3. Gently stir in the cereal. Lightly press the mixture into a buttered 9 x 13 pan.
4. In a double boiler or microwave oven, combine the chocolate and butterscotch chips and melt.
5. Immediately spread over bars in the pan.
6. Refrigerate just until the chocolate sets and hardens slightly.
7. Cut into squares. Makes 3 to 4 dozen bars.
